summary: Comprehensive testing of Ecommify business dashboard. All features working: PIN login (2409), Dashboard with stats cards and date picker, Sidebar navigation (all 9 tabs), Calendar page (add reminders/notes), Stores page (CRUD shops), Settings page (app settings/company data forms), Excel/Arkusze page (create/edit/save spreadsheets), Mobile bottom navigation. Backend API tests: 20/20 passed. Frontend UI tests: All passed.

issues: Console warnings about React hydration (span inside tbody/tr/td) - cosmetic React SSR warning, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: ExcelPage.jsx - React hydration warnings due to map() returning elements wrapped in spans inside table elements. Consider using React.Fragment or array index keys properly. Functionality not affected.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full e-commerce dashboard tested. All navigation working on desktop (sidebar) and mobile (bottom nav with 5 items + Więcej menu). New Excel-like spreadsheet page fully functional with CRUD operations. Calendar reminders/notes working. Stores page CRUD working. Settings page has app settings, company data, and logout. PIN login 2409 for Admin user.
